name: First Guaranty Bancshares, Inc.
summary: First Guaranty Bancshares, Inc. is a Louisiana financial holding company headquartered in Hammond, Louisiana. Through its wholly owned subsidiary, First Guaranty Bank, it provides commercial banking services via 30 facilities across Louisiana, Texas, Kentucky, and West Virginia. Services include commercial real estate loans, commercial and industrial loans, deposit accounts, credit cards, merchant services, mobile banking, ACH origination, lockbox services, and digital banking tools including bill pay, budgeting tools, and Credit Aware powered by Savvy Money.
